name: GH_Skin
summary: Provides static access to typical Palletes and other GUI colours.

methods.name: DefaultPalette
methods.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("This method is now available on GH_CapsuleRenderEngine")] public static GH_Palette DefaultPalette(IGH_ActiveObject obj)
methods.summary: Get the default palette as implied by the object state. Locked and Hidden flags are ignored.

methods.name: LoadSkin
methods.summary: Instantiate all palette and gui defaults. This function reads the colour values out of grasshopper_gui.xml settings database if it exists.

methods.name: SaveSkin
methods.summary: Store all palette and gui defaults. This function writes the colour values out to grasshopper_gui.xml settings database.

properties.name: canvas_back
properties.summary: Specifies canvas background colour.

properties.name: canvas_edge
properties.summary: Specifies canvas edge colour.

properties.name: canvas_grid
properties.summary: Specifies canvas grid colour.

properties.name: canvas_grid_col
properties.summary: Specifies the interval of the canvas grid columns.

properties.name: canvas_grid_row
properties.summary: Specifies the interval of the canvas grid rows.

properties.name: canvas_mono
properties.summary: Canvas monochromatic flag. If True, the canvas background is a solid colour.

properties.name: canvas_mono_color
properties.summary: If canvas_mono is set to true, this colour specified the solid background fill for the canvas.

properties.name: canvas_shade
properties.summary: Specifies the colour of the canvas drop shadow.

properties.name: canvas_shade_size
properties.summary: Specifies the size of the canvas drop shadow.

properties.name: group_back
properties.summary: Specifies the default fill colour for Group objects.

properties.name: palette_black_selected
properties.summary: Black palette, selected.

properties.name: palette_black_standard
properties.summary: Black palette, unselected.

properties.name: palette_blue_selected
properties.summary: Blue palette, selected.

properties.name: palette_blue_standard
properties.summary: Blue palette, unselected.

properties.name: palette_brown_selected
properties.summary: Brown palette, selected.

properties.name: palette_brown_standard
properties.summary: Brown palette, unselected.

properties.name: palette_error_selected
properties.summary: Errors, selected palette. Default background for parameters and components that carry errors.

properties.name: palette_error_standard
properties.summary: Errors, unselected palette. Default background for parameters and components that carry errors.

properties.name: palette_grey_selected
properties.summary: Grey palette, selected.

properties.name: palette_grey_standard
properties.summary: Grey palette, unselected.

properties.name: palette_hidden_selected
properties.summary: Hidden, selected palette. Default background for PanelHidden (preview=off) parameters and components.

properties.name: palette_hidden_standard
properties.summary: Hidden, unselected palette. Default background for PanelHidden (preview=off) parameters and components.

properties.name: palette_locked_selected
properties.summary: Locked, selected palette. Default background for locked parameters and components.

properties.name: palette_locked_standard
properties.summary: Locked, unselected palette. Default background for locked parameters and components.

properties.name: palette_normal_selected
properties.summary: Normal, selected palette. Default background for parameters and components.

properties.name: palette_normal_standard
properties.summary: Normal, unselected palette. Default background for parameters and components.

properties.name: palette_pink_selected
properties.summary: Pink palette, selected.

properties.name: palette_pink_standard
properties.summary: Pink palette, unselected.

properties.name: palette_trans_selected
properties.summary: Transparent palette, selected.

properties.name: palette_trans_standard
properties.summary: Transparent palette, unselected.

properties.name: palette_warning_selected
properties.summary: Warnings, selected palette. Default background for parameters and components that carry warnings.

properties.name: palette_warning_standard
properties.summary: Warnings, unselected palette. Default background for parameters and components that carry warnings.

properties.name: palette_white_selected
properties.summary: White palette, selected.

properties.name: palette_white_standard
properties.summary: White palette, unselected.

properties.name: panel_back
properties.summary: Specifies the default fill colour for Panel objects.

properties.name: wire_default
properties.summary: Specifies the default wire colour.

properties.name: wire_empty
properties.summary: Specifies the colour for empty (null) wires.

properties.name: wire_selected_a
properties.summary: Specifies the colour for wires at the selected end.

properties.name: wire_selected_b
properties.summary: Specifies the colour for wires at the unselected end.

properties.name: zui_edge
properties.summary: Specifies the default edge colour for ZUI elements.

properties.name: zui_edge_highlight
properties.summary: Specifies the default edge colour for highlighted ZUI elements.

properties.name: zui_fill
properties.summary: Specifies the default fill colour for ZUI elements.

properties.name: zui_fill_highlight
properties.summary: Specifies the default fill colour for highlighted ZUI elements.
